metric_results.label: Telemetry quality stress score
metric_results.remediation_hint: Increase runtime trace coverage for latency, retrieval, upload, render, cost, retry, fallback, and OCR health.

parameters.rationale: Ceiling-resistant score: zero observed errors is insufficient when trace coverage is missing or only inferred from fallback artifacts.

threshold_policy.rationale: Increase runtime trace coverage for latency, retrieval, upload, render, cost, retry, fallback and OCR health.
